name: Set Adrift
description: This model gains the following trigger on all actions printed on its stat card:

granted_abilities.name: Scream of the Lost
granted_abilities.text: This trigger must be declared, if able. Immediately, this action fails. This model must drain a (fortitude) or be killed. This model may discard a card to discard this upgrade.

extraction_notes: The ability 'Scream of the Lost' is a special trigger that applies to all actions on the model's stat card.
The trigger has a mandatory declaration requirement and causes the action to fail immediately.
The model must then drain a fortitude or be killed, but may discard a card to discard the upgrade instead.
